Long-term Memory
Remembers facts, dates, preferences forever. Names, deadlines, client details — recalled instantly.

Questions

Everything you
want to know.

Which Indian languages does it support?
+
Kannada, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Hindi, Marathi, Gujarati, Malayalam, Punjabi, Odia – and more. Voice notes and text work in all. Auto-detects your language.
Do I need to install a new app?
+
No! AskGogo works directly inside WhatsApp or Telegram. Nothing to install. Just save the number and start chatting.
How does the referral program work?
+
Share your unique link from the bot (/refer). When a friend subscribes to Pro, both get 1 month free. Unlimited referrals – stack up to 12 months.
Is my data private?
+
Yes. Encrypted, never sold. Delete everything with /wipe. Data stored on servers in India.
Can I cancel anytime?
+
Yes. Type /cancel or email support@askgogo.in. You keep Pro access until billing cycle ends, then downgrade to Free.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 20, 2026

1. Data Controller

AskGogo is operated by Goverdhan M D, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. Contact: support@askgogo.in

2. What We Collect

Only data you explicitly share: messages, memories, reminders, lists, voice notes, photos, documents.

3. How We Use It

Solely to provide AskGogo services. Never sold or shared for marketing.

4. Storage

Supabase (PostgreSQL) with TLS encryption. Data stored on servers in India.

5. Deletion

Delete all data anytime via /wipe command.

6. Contact

support@askgogo.in

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: April 20, 2026

1. Service

AI assistant on Telegram and WhatsApp providing memory, reminders, calendar sync, document analysis, web search, expense tracking.

2. Plans

Free Beta gives basic access. Lite is ₹99/month. Starter is ₹149/month. Pro is ₹299/month. Founder Pro is ₹499/month. Features, fair-use limits, and advanced capabilities vary by plan.

3. Trial

7-day free Pro trial. No automatic charge.

4. Refunds

30-day money-back guarantee. Email support@askgogo.in.

Legal

Refund Policy

Last updated: April 20, 2026

30-Day Money-Back Guarantee

Full refund within 30 days of payment. Email support@askgogo.in with your Telegram username or WhatsApp number.

Cancellation

Cancel via /cancel or email. Paid features remain until billing period ends.
